name: gmlisp-tools
description: Minimal local tooling for GMLisp draft workflow

scripts.check:ir-demos: npm run build:ir-demos && node scripts/verify-ir.js ../examples/ir/demo1-stage-loop.ir.canonical.json ../examples/ir/demo1-stage-loop.ir.generated.json && node scripts/verify-ir.js ../examples/ir/demo2-event-recovery.ir.canonical.json ../examples/ir/demo2-event-recovery.ir.generated.json
